hero_subtitle: SFTY connects compliance data and actions into a role-secured, auditable workflow designed to support institutional readiness, governance, and encrypted evidence for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Without controlled access and comprehensive audit logs, compliance teams face challenges maintaining evidence integrity and managing sensitive data securely. This weakens institutional trust and complicates preparation for bank due diligence and regulatory review across digital asset operations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY establishes role-based access, audit logs and evidence integrity controls that protect workflows from provider output through case management to reporting for institutional teams.
workflow_title: From compliance intake to evidence reporting
workflow_description: SFTY structures secure workflows from provider inputs through case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support audit-ready reporting for enterprise clients.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented workflows. Audit-ready evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a secure compliance layer that connects provider outputs into traceable workflows, preserving evidence and streamlining audit and bank due diligence readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs requiring controlled compliance workflows with audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence packages and enterprise-grade deployment governance from intake to reporting.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support secure compliance workflows and audit trails
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY preserves evidence across compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how role-based access controls enhance operational security
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports bank due diligence and governance
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected control layer connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, case management and reporting into one secured, auditable workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures provider outputs into workflows by routing alerts, opening cases, applying rules, logging decisions, preserving evidence and preparing regulatory reports.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and evidence packages, supporting audit trails support compliance review and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating their outputs without disrupting current compliance processes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their results into structured compliance reviews, case evidence and auditable reporting workflows.
final_title: Review secure compliance workflows and governance
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit logs and evidence integrity for institutional compliance and operational readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
